title: The Diffusion Model
author: Zachary Proser
description: A coordinate-consistent visual guide to diffusion and flow: forward noise, learned denoising, guidance, latent compression, DiT, sampling, and flow matching.

blueprint.subject: GENERATIVE VISION
blueprint.eyebrow: Noise schedule · Latent path · Complete working drawing
blueprint.subtitle: Diffusion and flow turn a simple noise distribution into images by learning how a data distribution moves.
rfiSuggestions: What actually is the 'noise' the model removes?
Why does Stable Diffusion work in latent space?
How is flow matching different from diffusion?
